classification: controlled backlog, not a silent rollout

items.evidence: rawLine['uom'] defaults to EA beside quantity
items.risk: commercial quantity can remain free-text/default unit
items.required_repair: route customer order line quantity through {magnitude, unit_code, quantity_kind} and preserve original customer unit

items.evidence: line uom defaults to EA during intake commit
items.risk: email-derived commercial demand can silently assume EA
items.required_repair: quarantine unknown/missing UoM before governed SO/PO commit

items.evidence: execution log uom defaults to target uom or EA
items.risk: MES actuals can retain naked quantity semantics
items.required_repair: wrap actual consumption/completion in MEASVAL and item_uom_policy slot

items.evidence: genealogy fact stores quantity and uom
items.risk: analytics drill-through may lose original/canonical distinction
items.required_repair: link genealogy edge quantity to MEASVAL audit hash

items.risk: inspection specifications can bypass canonical unit lifecycle
items.required_repair: resolve spec unit through UoM alias/canonical catalog before FAI persistence

items.risk: special-characteristic acceptance criteria can remain free-text
items.required_repair: require canonical unit_code and quantity_kind for special-characteristic specs

items.evidence: quantity and quantity_used fields render as plain numbers
items.risk: batch release reviewer may not see original/canonical measurement evidence
items.required_repair: render MEASVAL drill-through and correction history in release review

items.evidence: quantity_received and quantity_rejected are parsed as numbers
items.risk: supplier quality case quantities can be stored without canonical unit
items.required_repair: replace plain quantity fields with UomQuantityWidget or backend MEASVAL contract

items.risk: maintenance cadence units can drift from canonical catalog
items.required_repair: map cadence units to canonical time units or controlled schedule policy

items.risk: normalized facts may be consumed without original-source drill-through
items.required_repair: publish normalized facts with source measurement hash and read-only authority label
